entries.description: Frozen 3-day Chinese-language technology news snapshot assembled from 36kr/geekpark/RSSHub-style public feed captures. 60 items total (20 per day across 2026-04-18, 2026-04-19, 2026-04-20). Executor-visible source data only; does not include hidden selection answers.

Frozen 3-day GitHub repository search snapshot for Python AI/LLM/agent repositories created during February 2024, sorted by stars at each capture time. 45 items total (15 per day across 2026-04-18, 2026-04-19, 2026-04-20). Each item carries captured_on so the latest day's stars can be used as the canonical popularity signal. Executor-visible source data only; does not include hidden selection answers.
